articles.title: MagSafe battery banks: Best picks for your iPhone 17, iPhone Air, and more
articles.summary: With iPhone Air, Apple reintroduced the MagSafe battery pack. It’s $99, and optimized specifically for iPhone Air. It’s rather slim, though it’s rather weak in capacity – making Qi2 alternatives all the more interesting. We’ll be delving into the top options on the market, just in case you want a higher capacity MagSafe battery for your iPhone, or aren’t buying the iPhone Air.
articles.title_zh: MagSafe 行動電源：iPhone 17、iPhone Air 等最佳選擇
articles.summary_zh: Apple 重新推出 MagSafe 電池組，售價 $99，專為 iPhone Air 優化。雖然容量較小，但 Qi2 替代方案同樣值得關注。

articles.title: Indie App Spotlight: ‘Mirage’ brings your Mac display to iPad and more with retina quality
articles.summary: Welcome to Indie App Spotlight . This is a weekly 9to5Mac series where we showcase the latest apps in the indie app world. If you’re a developer and would like your app featured, get in contact . Mirage is a brand new app that brings best-in-class desktop wireless screen sharing to your entire Apple ecosystem. You can stream from your Mac to your iPhone, iPad, Vision Pro, or even another Mac. It’s very low latency and has a plethora of great features that make it the one stop shop for remotely using your Mac.
articles.title_zh: 獨立應用焦點：Mirage 以視網膜品質將 Mac 顯示器投射到 iPad 等裝置
articles.summary_zh: Mirage 是一款全新應用，提供同級最佳的桌面無線螢幕分享功能，可連接整個 Apple 設備生態。

articles.title: iPadOS 27: Apple is leaving these five iPad models behind, but owners deserve better
articles.summary: We’re about 3 weeks out from when Apple unveiled iOS 27 to the world at WWDC26, and it’s still safe to say: this is an incredible update. It’s incredibly performant , and besides some small quirks and a little battery drain, it feels much more usable than iOS 26.5. While iOS 27 does support every device that ran iOS 26, the same isn’t true for iPadOS. A number of older iPadOS 26 devices will not be receiving the iPadOS 27 update, which I think is quite a shame – and Apple should mitigate this one way or another.
articles.title_zh: iPadOS 27：Apple 拋棄五款 iPad 機型，但用戶應該得到更好的對待
articles.summary_zh: 距離 Apple 在 WWDC26 發表 iOS 27 約三週，這是一次令人驚艷的更新，效能出眾，儘管有些小問題和電池耗電，但比 iOS 26.5 更易用。

articles.title: What new Google Messages features are rolling out [June 2026]
articles.summary: Like other Google apps, Messages for Android A/B tests many features. It can take the RCS/SMS client a rather long time to actually launch new functionality in stable. From various reports, Google announcements , and devices we’ve checked, this is the current state of Messages.
articles.title_zh: Google Messages 推出哪些新功能 [2026 年 6 月]
articles.summary_zh: Google Messages 進行多項 A/B 測試，RCS/SMS 用戶端需要相當長的時間才能推出穩定版新功能。

articles.title: Upgrade your social media with Vmake’s all-in-one studio – here’s what it can do
articles.summary: The social media age begs businesses and everyone else to bridge the gap between quality and quantity and, with Vmake’s AI studio of tools, you get an all-in-one, one-stop shop for everything you need to more easily create content.
articles.title_zh: 使用 Vmake 的一站式工作室升級您的社群媒體—以下是它能做的事
articles.summary_zh: Vmake AI 工具工作室提供一站式服務，幫助企業和個人輕鬆平衡品質與數量，創作更多內容。

articles.title: Galaxy M47 key specs, Tecno Camon Slim official, Week 26 in review
articles.summary: Samsung has confirmed the Galaxy M47 5G will launch in India on June 29. The phone packs a 6.7-inch 120Hz AMOLED display, a Snapdragon chipset, a 6,000mAh battery with 45W charging, and a 50MP main camera with OIS. Samsung is promising six Android updates and six years of security patches, making software support one of its biggest highlights. Tecno unveiled the Camon Slim to join the Spark and Pova Slim phones. This one is a tad thicker at 6.39mm, but it packs a large 6,000mAh battery, and is IP69/IP68 water-tight. The Nothing Phone (4b) is coming on July 7. This week, it showed off...
articles.title_zh: Galaxy M47 關鍵規格、Tecno Camon Slim 正式公布，第 26 週回顧
articles.summary_zh: Samsung 確認 Galaxy M47 5G 將於 6 月 29 日在印度推出，配備 6.7 吋 120Hz AMOLED 顯示屏、Snapdragon 晶片、6000mAh 電池與 45W 充電、50MP 主鏡頭，提供六年 Android 更新和安全補丁支持。

articles.title: Samsung starts working on One UI 9 for the Galaxy A24 4G after releasing stable One UI 8.5 update
articles.summary: Samsung released the Android 16-based One UI 8.5 stable update for the Galaxy A24 4G a few days ago, and now we learn it has started testing the Android 17-based One UI 9 for this smartphone. The One UI 9 build for the Galaxy A24 4G spotted on Samsung's server has firmware version A245FXXUCGZF4, but we don't know when Samsung will release the One UI 9 beta or stable update for the smartphone. In fact, the only smartphones that have received the One UI 9 beta so far are the Galaxy S26 series smartphones, even though Samsung is working on One UI 9 for multiple Galaxy devices. While...
articles.title_zh: Samsung 在發布穩定版 One UI 8.5 後開始開發 Galaxy A24 4G 的 One UI 9
articles.summary_zh: Samsung 已為 Galaxy A24 4G 發布 Android 16 版本的 One UI 8.5 穩定更新，現已開始測試 Android 17 版本的 One UI 9。

articles.title: Google Wallet can now track your packages
articles.summary: While probably not the most obvious or sensible integration out there, it does sound like a pretty nifty one. Also, we are pretty certain that this is not the first time Google has experimented with package tracking. If memory serves right, the now-retired Google Now (or rather transformed into Google Discover feed) used to offer the very same thing. Anyway, the idea is simple – Google scans your Gmail inbox and automatically recognizes digital receipts and tracking numbers, then simply uses those to provide parcel tracking info as part of the Google Wallet interface. The UI places...
articles.title_zh: Google Wallet 現可追蹤您的包裹
articles.summary_zh: Google Wallet 現已新增包裹追蹤功能，這項整合雖然不是最直觀的，但確實很實用。

articles.title: Foldable gaming mode is coming with Android 17
articles.summary: Frankly, we don’t see gaming-specific features come to the Android core all too often. Recently, ex-journalist and now Google employee Mishaal Rahman offered up a surprisingly detailed preview of a great new feature coming to Android 17. It is called Foldable gaming mode, and what it does is basically spawn a highly customizable virtual controller on the bottom half of your unfolded foldable device, with the actual game playing on the top half. For now, it’s just a 50/50 split, which you can’t adjust, but that could come in the future. The virtual joystick emulates controller...
articles.title_zh: Android 17 即將推出折疊手機遊戲模式
articles.summary_zh: Android 17 將新增折疊手機遊戲模式功能，這是 Android 核心少見的遊戲特定功能。

articles.title: Deals: Prime Day shopping is over, here are the best Galaxy S26 and Pixel 10 series deals
articles.summary: The four days of Amazon Prime Day shopping ended this Friday – so, let’s look at what the prices are like now. We’ve picked out the Samsung Galaxy S26 flagships plus a couple of Galaxy mid-rangers as well as the non-folding phones of the Google Pixel 10 lineup. The Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra still starts at under $1,000. However, that buys you 256GB of storage. You can upgrade to 512GB, but this year this is a $200 upgrade. As usual, we’ll point you to our comparison articles against the Galaxy S25 Ultra and iPhone 17 Pro Max. ...
articles.title_zh: 優惠：Prime Day 購物結束，Galaxy S26 和 Pixel 10 系列最佳優惠
articles.summary_zh: Amazon Prime Day 四天購物活動已結束，Galaxy S26 旗艦機和 Pixel 10 非折疊系列目前仍有優惠價格。

articles.title: Apple working on M7 Ultra Mac Studio for 2028 with potential major upgrade: report
articles.summary: Later this year, Apple will be debuting an updated version of the Mac Studio with M5 Max and M5 Ultra chips – a long awaited refresh. The current Mac Studio, released in early 2025, includes an M4 Max and M3 Ultra chip, so at least on the high end, it’s pretty behind. According to Bloomberg’s Mark Gurman , the M5-based Mac Studio, which should just be a chip upgrade, is still on track to launch this year. Looking ahead to 2028, there may be more interesting changes in the pipeline.
articles.title_zh: Apple 為 2028 年開發 M7 Ultra Mac Studio，可能進行重大升級：報告
articles.summary_zh: 蘋果今年將推出配備 M5 Max 和 M5 Ultra 晶片的更新版 Mac Studio。目前 2025 年初發布的 Mac Studio 配備 M4 Max 和 M3 Ultra 晶片，在高端市場明顯落後。

articles.title: How to create a macOS Golden Gate USB install drive [Video]
articles.summary: In this hands-on guide, I’ll show you how to transform a USB drive into a macOS Golden Gate USB installer . Having access to a macOS Golden Gate USB installer is useful for upgrading from macOS Tahoe or earlier versions of macOS across multiple Macs, among other use cases. Have a look at my full hands-on video walkthrough, and be sure to subscribe to 9to5Mac on YouTube for more Mac guides and tutorials.
articles.title_zh: 如何建立 macOS Golden Gate USB 安裝磁碟 [影片]
articles.summary_zh: 本實踐指南展示如何將 USB 磁碟轉換為 macOS Golden Gate USB 安裝程式，可用於從 macOS Tahoe 或更早版本升級多台 Mac。

articles.title: How to watch the Formula 1 race for free right now
articles.summary: This weekend, Apple TV is running a special promotion where all of its Formula 1 streaming is available for anyone in the United States to watch for free, no Apple TV subscription required. The Austrian Grand Prix race is about to start, and if you want to tune, simply open the Apple TV app on your preferred device.

articles.title: Your favorite tech will keep getting more expensive, and you can blame AI
articles.summary: Perhaps the most visible impact of the AI industry right now is that consumer electronics are getting more expensive. Price hikes are happening left and right and, while smartphones have been mostly spared so far, that no longer feels sustainable, and you can blame AI for it. This issue of 9to5Google Weekender is a part of our newsletter that highlights the biggest Google stories with added commentary and more. Sign up here to get Weekender delivered to your inbox every weekend, and catch our weekday roundups too!
articles.title_zh: 你最喜歡的科技產品會持續漲價，而你可以責怪 AI
articles.summary_zh: AI 產業目前最明顯的影響是消費電子產品價格上升，各類科技產品紛紛漲價，儘管智慧型手機目前基本未受影響，但這種情況似乎難以持續。

articles.title: We’re about to witness a critical moment for Verizon’s mobile plans
articles.summary: Credit: Edgar Cervantes / Android Authority Verizon recently shook things up in a big way with its new, low-cost Simplicity plan. While budget-oriented plans are often an afterthought for postpaid carriers, Verizon’s approach is genuinely different. The new budget plan isn’t just a “lesser” option; it’s now the default gateway to joining Verizon. If you visit Verizon’s website and click on the navigation bar, you’ll find the Simplicity plan comes up first, with the myPlan family buried under an “other plans” tab. This wasn’t an accident. In 2026, wireless consumers are presented with more choices than ever, and more than anything, they just want something that works without overwhelming them.
articles.title_zh: Verizon 行動方案的關鍵時刻即將到來
articles.summary_zh: Verizon 最近推出新的低成本 Simplicity 方案。與其他運營商的預付費方案不同，Verizon 的新方案採用不同策略，並非簡單的「縮水版」選項。

articles.title: Don’t buy a new smartphone in 2026 — buy these 5 older Android phones instead
articles.summary: Credit: Rita El Khoury / Android Authority The RAM crisis has led many new Android phones to skyrocket in price in 2026. However, we’ve also seen some companies take a different approach, offering minimal upgrades over the previous generation. And even in those cases, prices can still go up. Either way, I’d argue that this is one year when it’s often better to buy last year’s phone rather than the latest model. Don’t believe me? Here are five older phones worth buying over the current generation.
articles.title_zh: 不要在 2026 年購買新智慧型手機 — 改買這 5 款舊款 Android 手機
articles.summary_zh: RAM 危機導致 2026 年新款 Android 手機價格飆升，但一些廠商採取不同方法，只提供最小化升級。即便如此，價格仍會上漲。

articles.title: After trying a Google TV projector, I may never buy another TV ever again
articles.summary: Credit: Rita El Khoury / Android Authority I’ve been a fan of portable projectors since I first got to try the XGIMI MoGo Pro in 2019. Back then, it was a nice supplement to my streaming setup at home, like a portable TV that I could carry to the balcony or bedroom without having to lug around a huge television set. Over the years, I’ve used Android TV and then Google TV projectors in various capacities, from my kitchen to my outdoor deck. My latest projector replaced my Samsung Frame TV Pro after its display died, and I was left TV-less for a few weeks before it was repaired. It’s actually during those weeks that I realized something: Perhaps my next TV purchase won’t be a TV after all, but a high-end ultra-short-throw Google TV projector . Here’s why.
articles.title_zh: 嘗試過 Google TV 投影機後，我可能再也不會買新電視
articles.summary_zh: 自 2019 年首次試用 XGIMI MoGo Pro 後，我就一直是便攜投影機的粉絲。它是家中串流設備的完美補充，可攜帶到陽台或臥室。

articles.title: I was wrong — the Galaxy S26 Ultra’s battery life is fantastic
articles.summary: I was disappointed when I saw the spec sheet for the Galaxy S26 Ultra . The boost in charging speeds was welcome, but seeing Samsung stick with the same 5,000mAh battery made it natural to assume the experience would be no better than that of previous models. After a few months of use, it’s time to admit I was wrong. The Galaxy S26 Ultra has some of the best battery life I’ve ever seen, and it’s hard to give it up for other phones.
articles.title_zh: 我錯了 — Galaxy S26 Ultra 的電池續航能力非常優異
articles.summary_zh: 看到 Galaxy S26 Ultra 的規格表時我感到失望，雖然充電速度提升可喜，但三星仍沿用 5,000mAh 電池讓人預期續航不會有改善。經過數月使用後，情況有所改變。

articles.title: I tried switching from Gmail to Proton Mail for a week — and my inbox was a disaster
articles.summary: While Gmail is the dominant email service around the world, that doesn’t mean it doesn’t have flaws. Gmail has long been criticized for its lack of privacy and for including ads. More recently, the integration of Gemini in Gmail inboxes has become another point of contention. In light of this, Proton Mail has emerged as a privacy-focused alternative. I have always been hesitant to make the switch, since I’ve been using Gmail for years. But then I saw I could transfer my Gmail address to Proton, so I finally decided to try out the security-focused email app .
articles.title_zh: 我試著從 Gmail 改用 Proton Mail 一週 — 我的收件匣亂成一團
articles.summary_zh: 雖然 Gmail 是全球主導的電子郵件服務，但它並非沒有缺陷，長期因隱私保護不足和廣告問題受到批評。最近，Gemini 在 Gmail 收件匣的整合也引發爭議。

articles.title: 5 reasons why I’d buy the Pixel 10a instead of the Galaxy A57
articles.summary: When you’re shopping with a budget of around $500, the two Android mid-rangers that go head-to-head in the final showdown are the Google Pixel 10a and the Samsung Galaxy A57 . They may be priced closely, but they come with a very distinct set of characteristics — ones that can make or break the deal for you. They certainly have for me because, without a second thought, I would pick the Pixel 10a over the Galaxy A57 each and every time.
articles.title_zh: 為什麼我會選擇 Pixel 10a 而非 Galaxy A57 的 5 個原因
articles.summary_zh: 在 $500 預算內，Google Pixel 10a 和 Samsung Galaxy A57 是兩款中端 Android 手機的最終對決。雖然價格接近，但其特性差異很大，可能影響購買決定。

articles.title: Samsung Galaxy A37 and Galaxy A57 are available at a discounted price in the UK
articles.summary: The Samsung Galaxy A37 and Galaxy A57, which were unveiled in March and went on sale in the UK in April, are now available at a discounted price on Samsung's official UK website until July 14. The Galaxy A37 was launched in the UK with 6GB/128GB and 8GB/256GB memory configurations priced at £399 and £459, respectively. The Galaxy A57, on the other hand, launched with 8GB/256GB and 12GB/512GB options, priced at £529 and £699, respectively. Samsung Galaxy A37 • Samsung Galaxy A57 Samsung has discounted both memory versions of the Galaxy A57 and the 8GB/256GB model of the Galaxy...
articles.title_zh: Samsung Galaxy A37 和 Galaxy A57 在英國以折扣價販售
articles.summary_zh: Samsung Galaxy A37 和 Galaxy A57 於 3 月推出，4 月在英國上市，現已在 Samsung 英國官方網站上以折扣價販售至 7 月 14 日。

articles.title: Oppo Enco Air5s unboxing and ears-on
articles.summary: Now that we've unboxed the Oppo Enco Air5, it's time for the new Enco Air5s. Dubbed as Oppo's first semi-in-ear earbuds, the Air5s come in Lunar White, Midnight Black, and Starlight Purple. Because the buds are open-ear, there are no silicone tips in the box. Oppo Enco Air5s The Enco Air5s share some of the core specs of the Air5 (and Air5 Pro), such as the 12mm dynamic driver. However, these buds have a smaller case (with the same 530mAh battery), and smaller in-bud batteries at 40.5mAh (vs 62mAh on the Air5). As a result, you're getting up to 48 hours on a charge compared to...
articles.title_zh: Oppo Enco Air5s 開箱與試聽
articles.summary_zh: 在開箱 Oppo Enco Air5 後，現在輪到新款 Enco Air5s。作為 Oppo 首款開放式耳塞，Air5s 提供月白色、午夜黑和星光紫三款顏色。

articles.title: Deals: Poco F8 Ultra and F8 Pro, plus Poco X8 Pro and X8 Pro Max are on sale
articles.summary: Prime Day ran from Tuesday to Friday, but that’s over with now. So, we turned our attention to regular deals (no subscription required) and here is what we found – a lot of Poco phones. Starting with the Poco F8 Ultra and Poco F8 Pro – here’s the versus article – you can get flagship performance from this year (Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5) or from last year (Snapdragon 8 Elite). The Ultra is a large phone with a 6.9” display and a 6,500mAh battery, while the Pro is mid-sized with a 6.59” display and 6,210mAh battery. Both phones have 100W wired charging, but only the Ultra does wireless...
articles.title_zh: 優惠：Poco F8 Ultra、F8 Pro、X8 Pro 和 X8 Pro Max 正在促銷中
articles.summary_zh: Prime Day 已結束，現在轉向一般優惠，發現了大量 Poco 手機促銷。Poco F8 Ultra 和 Poco F8 Pro 等機型現提供旗艦級性能的優惠價格。

articles.title: “Bring it to our shop”: Workday’s pitch for keeping AI agents close to your most valuable data
articles.summary: Workday, the payroll and HR data platform, has been pursuing AI and agents for a while, but while other businesses may allow a little room for error, getting a payroll run in Workday 99% right is not exactly good enough. Gabe Monroy , Workday’s chief technology officer, tells The New Stack that enterprise AI has to clear this bar before anyone will let it near their HR and finance data. “There aren’t many systems that are more critical — or less forgiving — than ones that are dealing with people and money,” he says. There’s no tolerance for “well, it works most of the time,” Monroy says in an interview. At its DevCon developer conference in early June, Workday laid out its plans to clear this correctness bar. The company introduced Agen
articles.title_zh: 「帶到我們店裡」：Workday 推介將 AI 代理保持在最寶貴數據附近的方案
articles.summary_zh: Workday 這個薪資和人力資源數據平台一直在開發 AI 和代理，但與其他企業不同，薪資運行 99% 的準確度對於 Workday 來說還不夠好。

articles.title: Okta is the first to bring AI agent governance inside FedRAMP boundaries
articles.summary: Okta has made its AI agent governance platform generally available for FedRA MP- and HIPAA-regulated environments, becoming what it claims is the first independent identity platform to extend AI agent lifecycle management inside the compliance boundaries federal agencies and healthcare organizations already trust. The product, Okta for AI Agents – Core , elevates AI agents to first-class identities managed alongside human and machine workforces. This is a shift from the practice of treating agents as static service accounts or hardcoded API keys. The launch comes as federal agencies face mounting pressure from the recent executive order on AI innovation and security, which directs agencies to deploy AI agents and mandates that they secure them. “The message
articles.title_zh: Okta 首次在 FedRAMP 邊界內推出 AI 代理治理
articles.summary_zh: Okta 已使其 AI 代理治理平台在 FedRAMP 和 HIPAA 受規管環境中正式上市，成為首個將 AI 代理生命週期管理擴展到聯邦機構和醫療保健合規邊界內的獨立身份平台。

articles.title: What to Do in Houston If You're Here for Business (2026)
articles.summary: Where to eat, stay, work, and eat some more while visiting Space City on business.
articles.title_zh: 2026年因公務到休士頓該做的事
articles.summary_zh: 造訪 Space City 出差時，推薦的餐飲、住宿、工作場所及美食景點。

articles.title: The ‘Almost Homeless’ Subreddit Is a Stark Glimpse at Soaring Wealth Inequality
articles.summary: As the billionaire class gets richer, the growing online community is offering tips on how to survive with very little.
articles.title_zh: 「幾乎無家可歸」Subreddit 揭示財富不平等的嚴峻現實
articles.summary_zh: 隨著億萬富豪階級愈加富裕，這個快速成長的線上社群正提供以極少資源生存的建議。

articles.title: Why Wear Anything Other Than a Sun Hoodie This Summer? Our Picks for the Best
articles.summary: Sun hoodies are the greatest new garment since the original hoodie.
articles.title_zh: 今年夏天為何要穿 Sun Hoodie？我們精選的最佳款式
articles.summary_zh: Sun hoodie 是自原始連帽衫以來最偉大的新款服飾。

articles.title: This Is the Most Detailed Image Yet of the Milky Way's Center
articles.summary: The Euclid space telescope's stunning photo of our galaxy's “crowded heart” captures more than 60 million stars.
articles.title_zh: 迄今最詳細的銀河系中心影像
articles.summary_zh: Euclid 太空望遠鏡拍攝的銀河系「擁擠中心」令人驚艷的照片捕捉了超過 6,000 萬顆星星。

articles.title: The Ebike Accessories You Need to Help You Haul the Most Stuff
articles.summary: An unadorned ebike is a blank canvas. Here, get tips for maximizing its cargo-hauling and person-carrying capabilities.
articles.title_zh: 協助您運送最多物品的電動自行車配件
articles.summary_zh: 樸素的電動自行車是一塊白板，這裡提供最大化其貨物運輸和載人能力的建議。

articles.title: China Defies US Restrictions and Builds the World’s Fastest Supercomputer
articles.summary: The Chinese supercomputer LineShine was ranked as the fastest in the world, despite not using any GPUs.
articles.title_zh: 中國無視美國限制，打造全球最快超級電腦
articles.summary_zh: 中國超級電腦 LineShine 被評為全球最快，儘管未使用任何 GPU。

articles.title: AI Startup Firmus to Build Indonesia Data Center With Nvidia
articles.summary: Firmus Technologies Pty Ltd. will build its first data center project in Indonesia as part of a partnership with US chip giant Nvidia Corp., which the Australian artificial intelligence infrastructure firm said is expected to win it as much as $30 billion in committed offtake agreements in its first six years.
articles.title_zh: AI 新創企業 Firmus 將與 Nvidia 在印尼建設資料中心
articles.summary_zh: 澳洲人工智慧基礎設施公司 Firmus Technologies Pty Ltd. 將與美國晶片巨擘 Nvidia Corp. 合作，在印尼建設首個資料中心項目，預期將獲得最多 300 億美元的承諾購電協議。

articles.title: How Robotaxis Are Making Headway, Glitches and All
articles.summary: It’s one of those technologies that were always around the corner but never arrived. Now it has, kind of...
articles.title_zh: 機器人計程車如何取得進展，問題也隨之而來
articles.summary_zh: 這是一項長期以來承諾即將推出卻始終未能實現的技術，現在已部分實現。

articles.title: Apple’s Sweeping Price Increases Bring Home the Costs of the AI Era
articles.summary: The latest on the smart glasses competition.
articles.title_zh: Apple 大幅漲價凸顯 AI 時代的成本
articles.summary_zh: 智慧眼鏡競爭的最新動態。

articles.title: Austria Lobbies EU to Host Anthropic After US Access Curbs
articles.summary: Austria is pushing the European Union to consider hosting Anthropic PBC within its borders to counter US efforts to block foreigners from using its most advanced artificial-intelligence models.
articles.title_zh: 奧地利遊說歐盟在其境內主機 Anthropic
articles.summary_zh: 奧地利正推動歐盟考慮在其境內主機 Anthropic PBC，以對抗美國阻止外國人使用其最先進人工智慧模型的舉措。

articles.title: Europe’s Hunt for AI Stocks Leads to Power Suppliers and Banks
articles.summary: Investors who want additional exposure to artificial intelligence in Europe are getting creative, searching out companies that enable the technology or stand to benefit from it as the usual suspects get more pricey.
articles.title_zh: 歐洲尋找 AI 股票引向電力供應商和銀行
articles.summary_zh: 尋求增加歐洲人工智慧敞口的投資者想出創意方法，物色支持該技術或受其惠及的公司，因為主要標的股價持續上漲。

articles.title: Google Caps Meta’s Use of Gemini AI, Financial Times Reports
articles.summary: Google has placed limits on Meta Platforms Inc.’s use of its Gemini artificial intelligence models because it could not provide as much computing capacity as the social media company wanted, according to the Financial Times.
articles.title_zh: 據金融時報報導，Google 限制 Meta 使用 Gemini AI
articles.summary_zh: 根據金融時報報導，Google 限制 Meta Platforms Inc. 使用其 Gemini 人工智慧模型，因為 Google 無法提供該社群媒體公司所需的運算容量。

articles.title: AI Bust Risks Ripple Effects From Growth to Credit, BIS Says
articles.summary: An artificial-intelligence bust, inflation and fiscal stress are among the most alarming threats to global prosperity at present, the Bank for International Settlements warned.
articles.title_zh: AI 泡沫風險將波及全球成長和信貸，國際清算銀行警告
articles.summary_zh: 國際清算銀行警告，人工智慧泡沫、通膨和財政壓力是當前全球繁榮最令人擔憂的威脅。

articles.title: OpenAI Hires Uber’s Prabhjeet Singh to Lead India Operations
articles.summary: OpenAI appointed Uber Technologies Inc.’s former India and South Asia President Prabhjeet Singh as its managing director for the country, deepening its investment in one of its fastest-growing markets.
articles.title_zh: OpenAI 聘請 Uber 前高管 Prabhjeet Singh 領導印度業務
articles.summary_zh: OpenAI 任命 Uber Technologies Inc. 前印度及南亞區總裁 Prabhjeet Singh 為該國常務董事，深化在快速成長市場的投資。

articles.title: Tencent Trials TenPayGo Pay App as Foreign Visits to China Rise
articles.summary: Tencent Holdings Ltd. is testing an app aimed at helping overseas visitors navigate daily life in China, Jiemian News reported on Sunday.
articles.title_zh: 騰訊測試 TenPayGo 支付應用程式，應對赴華外國遊客增長
articles.summary_zh: 據界面新聞週日報導，騰訊控股有限公司正測試一款應用程式，旨在幫助海外訪客在中國日常生活中暢通無阻。

articles.title: AI Fever Powers HK Share Sales Through Hurdles to Five-Year High
articles.summary: Hong Kong share sales surged to a five-year high in the first half of 2026 as investor enthusiasm around the artificial intelligence boom overpowered the drag of a sluggish equity market and regulatory headwinds.
articles.title_zh: AI 熱潮推動香港股票銷售突破重重障礙達五年高點
articles.summary_zh: 2026年上半年香港股票銷售飆升至五年高點，因投資者對人工智慧熱潮的熱情超越了股市疲弱和監管阻力的拖累。

articles.title: Amazon Prime Day Total Online Spending Surpasses Adobe Estimate
articles.summary: Online spending across all retailers in the US hit $26.4 billion during Amazon.com Inc.’s annual Prime Day sale, according to Adobe Inc., narrowly beating the firm’s earlier estimate of $26.3 billion.
articles.title_zh: Amazon Prime Day 線上總支出超越 Adobe 預估
articles.summary_zh: 據 Adobe Inc. 統計，美國零售業在 Amazon.com Inc. 年度 Prime Day 促銷期間的線上支出達 264 億美元，略超該公司先前估計的 263 億美元。

articles.title: 中國車主瘋魔改電池使電動車續航翻倍，專家指變路上移動炸彈
articles.summary: 中國電動車改裝店近年後備箱、前備箱加入額外電池包或非法增程器，能把衰減車輛續航從數十公里拉回數百公里，短期解決 […]
